metadata.title: zone lab — Building software that helps you level up
metadata.description: AI-augmented product studio based in Taiwan. We build software for self-improvement.

hero.title: Building software that helps you level up.
hero.subtitle: AI-augmented product studio based in Taiwan.

improvement.title: Self-improvement, not distraction
improvement.description: We believe technology should make people better, not distracted. Every product revolves around one core question: "How does this help users grow?"

execution.title: Focused execution
execution.description: We are a lean team where every member is an expert. Less is more — focus on doing the right things, not doing many things.

speed.title: Ship fast, iterate faster
speed.description: We don't make 5-year plans. We ship quickly, collect feedback, and continuously improve. Products are always in beta, because we're always evolving.

marawanna.name: Marawanna
marawanna.description: Your personal marathon coach, powered by data.

product2.name: Project Alpha
product2.description: Intelligent habit tracking for peak performance.

team.title: Meet the team.
team.description: Lean, cross-disciplinary, high-execution. Every member focuses on their domain, building meaningful products together.
team.pageDescription: We are a small but mighty team. Each person brings deep expertise and a strong point of view.

jason.name: Jason
jason.quote: I decide, I own it, I experiment.
jason.bio: Founder of zone lab. Believes lean teams + high-efficiency collaboration is the future of work. No pitch decks — just ship products.

northstar.name: North Star
northstar.quote: I don't just report the market — I tell you what we should build.
northstar.bio: Responsible for market signal collection and product direction. Opinionated and unafraid of controversy. If I say "this is the next opportunity," it is.

houdini.name: Houdini
houdini.quote: I turn specs into things that work.
houdini.bio: Responsible for product development, from frontend to backend. Loves clean architecture and elegant solutions. If it can be done in 10 lines, never write 100.

watchdog.name: WatchDog
watchdog.quote: I make sure things don't blow up.
watchdog.bio: Responsible for infrastructure, deployment, and monitoring. You don't see my work — because when I do it well, nothing happens.

vampire.name: Vampire
vampire.bio: Responsible for product data analysis and user behavior insights. Numbers don't lie, but they can be misread. My job is to find the signals that truly matter.

echo.name: Echo
echo.quote: I hear what users say — and what they don't.
echo.bio: Responsible for user feedback collection and support. Behind every complaint is a product improvement opportunity. My job is to not let those signals disappear.

thomas.name: Thomas
thomas.quote: I track progress so you can focus on building.
thomas.bio: Responsible for operations tracking and weekly reports. I don't rush people, but I make sure nothing is forgotten.

godin.name: Godin
godin.bio: Responsible for marketing content and external communications. Great products need great stories. My job is to make people remember why we exist.

footer.tagline: Building software that helps you level up.
